# ParamEncoding.MaxSafeAnnotatedInteger field

The widest integer that may safely carry the `x-mcp-header` annotation: `2^53 − 1`. (R-9.5.1-g) Equal to JavaScript's `Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER`.

```csharp
public const long MaxSafeAnnotatedInteger;
```
